title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Pre-release device shows "Device support coming soon" pop-up with limited functionality when connected before official launch date
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a pre-release / not-yet-released Poly Bluetooth audio device to the app.
3. Observe the connection status icon on the Home screen.
4. Tap the black "i" icon in the top right corner of the connection status area.
6. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The connection status icon shows a green ring with a black "i" icon in the top right corner. Tapping the "i" icon displays a pop-up message: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
